Investor Hub · Confidential Overview

The $88B Burnout
Market Has No
Structural Answer.

Until now.

Strategic Transformations is a structural burnout consultancy with a proprietary diagnostic framework, a growing multi-channel product ecosystem, a published author platform, and a founder whose lived authority cannot be manufactured or replicated. We are building toward scale — and seeking aligned capital partners to accelerate the work.

Request Investor Briefing → View Service Architecture

Market figures are sourced from publicly available industry research. Projections are forward-looking strategic modeling, not guarantees. Full investor deck available upon request after briefing.

$88B+

Global Burnout Economic Cost

Gallup / WHO estimates

77%

Workers Reporting Burnout

Gallup State of Global Workplace

2–3×

Salary Cost to Replace Burned-Out Employee

SHRM / industry research

$1.1T

US Productivity Loss from Disengagement

Gallup 2024 estimate

Market Problem

A multi-billion dollar problem.
Zero structural solutions.

The burnout market has generated massive investment — and virtually none of it addresses the actual source of the problem.

Human Sustainability Vendors

$61B+ market

Treats burnout as an individual human sustainability issue disconnected from leadership architecture risk. Mindfulness apps, EAPs, resilience trainings. All downstream.

✗None of it changes the structure producing the exhaustion. Market keeps growing because the interventions don't work.

Traditional HR Consulting

$37B+ market

Engagement surveys, pulse checks, policy recommendations. Measures symptoms without structural diagnosis.

✗Output is a report. Not recalibration. Organizations pay for data they already have without a path to change.

Human Sustainability & Culture Programs

$9.3B market

Valuable but typically siloed. Addresses inclusion and support without diagnosing leadership architecture risk and structural strain.

✗People feel seen. Still burned out. The architecture of harm remains intact.

Strategic Transformations fixes the design.

The only practitioner-developed framework that treats burnout as what it is — a structural failure — and delivers a diagnostic and recalibration pathway that addresses it at the root. Not downstream. Not symptomatic. Structural.

The Solution

A proprietary framework with
multi-channel revenue architecture.

The UNMASK Framework

The UNMASK Framework is a diagnostic and recalibration methodology that identifies hidden strains — the "masks" individuals, institutions, and communities wear under systemic pressure — and rebuilds authentic leadership capacity. Developed through direct organizational consulting and grounded in Womanist theology, it operates across three levels.

U Uncover Surface the hidden strains — the masks — that individuals, teams, and institutions have normalized into invisibility.
N Navigate Chart the structural landscape and map the conditions driving exhaustion, attrition, and silenced capacity.
M Manage Develop recalibration strategies and implement structural redesign with clear accountability structures.
A Advocate Champion the structural and systemic changes required for human flourishing — individual, organizational, and collective.
S Sustain Embed recalibration into the ongoing operational rhythm so transformation outlasts the engagement.
K Kindle Ignite collective capacity — relighting the fire in leaders, teams, and communities ready to lead without running on empty.

Entry Diagnostic

Structural Strain Score (SSS)

9-question assessment that begins every engagement. Free tier of the UNMASK Recalibrate app.

Competitive Moat

Practitioner authority, Army veteran discipline, womanist theological grounding, and graduate academic credibility create a combination no human sustainability vendor or HR consultancy can replicate. The methodology is proprietary. The credibility is non-transferable.

Revenue Architecture

High-Ticket Consulting Services

Active

Proposal-Based

UNMASK Diagnostic, Recalibration Engagement, AI Audit, Retainer. High-margin, high-touch.

Speaking & Keynotes

Active

Proposal-Based

5 signature talks. Conference circuit, corporate events, academic institutions. Recurring revenue pipeline.

UNMASK Blueprint Series

Active

Individual + Institutional Licensing

Three published volumes. Digital and physical. Institutional licensing at scale. Growing product revenue stream.

URI Formation

Active

Proposal-Based

Justice-centered leadership formation. Faith-based, nonprofit, and academic markets. Mission-aligned revenue.

UNMASK Recalibrate App

In Development

Subscription TBD

Freemium web/mobile app launching 2026. Free SSS tier drives adoption → premium access unlocks LMI, RAA Calculator, AI Burnout Index. Target: 25K free users Year 1, 3–5% paid conversion.

Enterprise Framework Licensing

Pipeline

Scope-Based

UNMASK licensed for organizational-wide deployment, practitioner certification programs, and white-label consulting infrastructure.

Founder

Authority that cannot be manufactured.

The founder is not a consultant who found a niche. She is a practitioner who built a diagnostic system from the inside of the problem.

🎖️

Army Veteran

Military discipline, crisis leadership, and organizational systems thinking applied to a civilian burnout epidemic. Leadership under real pressure — not theoretical.

✍🏾

Practitioner-Scholar

Graduate work in Religions, Ethics & Public Intellectuals. Womanist theology as epistemological foundation — not decoration. Academic rigor meeting field-tested practice.

🏗️

Framework Creator

UNMASK developed through direct organizational consulting — not academic theory. The IP is proprietary. The methodology is tested across sectors.

📖

Published Author

Three-volume UNMASK Blueprint Series positions ST as thought leadership, not just services. The books create inbound pipeline at scale.

🌐

Liberation Grounded

Womanist ethics and liberation philosophy provide a justice-centered intellectual framework that differentiates ST in a market of performance-optimization consultants.

🤝

Cross-Sector Track Record

Nonprofit, faith-based, corporate, government, higher education. Structural burnout is not industry-specific. Neither is the solution.

Digital Product · In Development

UNMASK Recalibrate

Diagnostics for a Resilient Future

The digital companion to the trilogy — a freemium web and mobile app launching in 2026, designed to make UNMASK's proprietary diagnostic tools accessible at scale while funneling users to high-value consulting services.

Three Target Audiences

→

Individuals

Personal recalibration — entry through the free Structural Strain Score (SSS).

→

Institutions

Team and organizational health — RAA Calculator, AI Burnout Index, scenario planners.

→

Educators & Empowerers

Justice-centered communities — collaborative modules, group diagnostics, offline resilience tools.

Revenue Model

Free Tier Structural Strain Score (SSS) — 9-question entry assessment. Drives top-of-funnel adoption.
Premium Tier Full LMI, RAA Calculator, AI Acceleration Burnout Index, personalized Womanist-informed recommendations.
Institutional License Scope-based access for nonprofits, HBCUs, and mission-driven organizations.
Retainer Funnel High diagnostic scores trigger upsells to proposal-based consulting retainers.

Key Features

🧮

Diagnostic Suite

LMI, RAA Calculator, AI Acceleration Burnout Index, Burnout Scenario Simulator, Market Gap Visualizer, Economic Resilience Scorecard.

⚡

Ethical AI

AI-generated playbooks that are bias-checked and Womanist-informed — countering "AI brain fry" without replicating it.

📥

Offline Resilience

Downloadable PDF assessments and blueprints. Vital for justice work in low-connectivity and high-disruption environments.

🤝

Community Modules

Segmented forums for educators in marginalized spaces. Collaborative diagnostics for collective recalibration.

Year 1–2 Projections

→25,000 free users targeted by Year 1
→3–5% free-to-paid conversion rate
→Annual potential modeled by offer mix
→Year 2 revenue potential modeled by full market entry

Projections are forward-looking strategic modeling, not guarantees. Based on $5.2B mental health app market (Statista 2023) projected to $17.5B by 2030.

Traction

What's already in motion.

Strategic Transformations is generating revenue and building the platform for scale. Seed capital is not for survival — it is for acceleration.

Published Intellectual Property

  • →UNMASK Blueprint Series — 3 volumes published
  • →UNMASK Interactive Web Application live
  • →Proprietary diagnostic framework fully documented
  • →IP protection and licensing infrastructure in development

Active Service Delivery

  • →Consulting engagements across nonprofit, corporate, and faith-based sectors
  • →Speaking and keynote pipeline active
  • →Embedded strategic partnership and organizational advisory work
  • →URI Formation engagements in execution

Platform & Systems

  • →GoHighLevel CRM with lead capture and pipeline automation
  • →UNMASK digital checkout infrastructure live (unmask.nikkicates.com)
  • →Consolidated digital ecosystem (nikkicates.github.io) in deployment
  • →Newsletter infrastructure active via The Unbothered Collective

Network & Authority Building

  • →BNI membership active — professional referral network engaged
  • →Graduate academic work in progress — credentialing the methodology
  • →Conference speaking circuit development
  • →ATHENA NextGen leadership program pipeline (Orlando)
Seed Capital

What capital unlocks.

The foundation is built. The IP is documented. The market is proven. Capital accelerates the three things that compound fastest: product, platform, and pipeline.

🛠️

Product Development

  • →UNMASK SaaS platform — full buildout and institutional-grade deployment
  • →AI-enhanced diagnostic tools integrated into the UNMASK engine
  • →Enterprise licensing and practitioner certification infrastructure
  • →Vol. 4 and advanced content development
📡

Market Expansion

  • →National speaking circuit acceleration — 10+ conferences annually
  • →Corporate and enterprise client pipeline scaling
  • →Academic and higher education partnerships
  • →International expansion — starting with Caribbean and African diaspora markets
⚙️

Operational Infrastructure

  • →Team expansion: operations, client success, content
  • →Full IP protection, trademark, and legal infrastructure
  • →Marketing and thought leadership amplification
  • →CRM and fulfillment systems optimization at scale

What we are looking for in a capital partner.

✓Alignment with the liberation-grounded vision — not just the financials
✓Understanding that justice-centered frameworks are the future of organizational health
✓Patient capital that supports a build designed for scale, not a quick exit
✓Connections and relationships in the enterprise, nonprofit, and academic markets
✓Respect for the founder's intellectual authority and methodological sovereignty

Strategic Transformations is not looking for investors who want to change the vision. We are looking for investors who understand what it is — and want to build it with us.

Ready to explore alignment?

All investor conversations begin with an Executive Briefing. The full investor deck — including financial projections, revenue model detail, and capitalization structure — is available by request only after vetting.
